gcSpeech.title: Message from GC ቤንሃናን
gcSpeech.subtitle: A word of blessing to the graduating class
gcSpeech.speech:
Dear beloved graduates of 2026,

As you step into a new chapter of life, remember the foundation laid here in fellowship — in prayer, in worship, and in service. You have been shaped not only by your studies but by the love of this community.

Go forth with courage, carry Christ in your hearts, and let your light shine wherever you go. The fellowship family is proud of each one of you.

May God bless you abundantly.

With love,
GC ቤንሃናን

home.completeProfile: Complete your profile to appear in the graduate gallery.
home.berketSpeech:
Dear graduating class of 2026,

On behalf of the GC committee, I congratulate each of you for reaching this milestone. Your faith, discipline, and service in fellowship have prepared you for the journey ahead.

May you continue to walk with Christ and serve your community with excellence.

With blessings,
Engineer Berket
home.semagagnSpeech:
Beloved brothers and sisters,

It has been a joy to serve alongside you in this fellowship family. Through worship, prayer, and ministry, we have grown together in faith and friendship.

As you graduate, carry the love of this community and the light of Christ wherever you go.

In Christ,
Semagegn
